steps.title: Find the contextual cue
steps.content: The example sentence makes the meaning explicit: scholars may inadvertently overlook nuances in Alcott's work by focusing only on his transcendentalist features. The blank should match "overlook" — to dismiss or undervalue the subtleties.

steps.title: Pick the synonym for "overlook/dismiss"
steps.content:
A (magnify) and B (scrutinize) mean the opposite — paying more attention. D (denounce) means to publicly criticize, which is too active.

C (discount) means to disregard or undervalue — exactly the meaning of "overlook" in this context. C is correct.
